basic_details.job_title: SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: State Health Systems Resource Centre Tamil Nadu
basic_details.short_information: State Health Systems Resource Centre Tamil Nadu (SHSRC Tamil Nadu) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 12 Intern Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MPH / MHA / MSW, Postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines
qualification.details: MPH / MHA / MSW or Postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines from recognised institutions.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SHSRC Tamil Nadu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SHSRC Tamil Nadu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Intern positions at SHSRC Tamil Nadu is 23rd July 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Intern post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for the Intern position by the State Health Systems Resource Centre Tamil Nadu. This offers a good opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MPH, MHA, MSW, or a postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Intern position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Intern post will receive a monthly stipend ranging from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Intern positions at SHSRC Tamil Nadu is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Intern position?
faq.answer: The Intern positions at SHSRC Tamil Nadu are offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the SHSRC Tamil Nadu located?
faq.answer: The State Health Systems Resource Centre Tamil Nadu (SHSRC Tamil Nadu) is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. This is the primary location for the organization's operations.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the recruitment is for Tamil Nadu. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from outside the state.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
